message:
fix: use rig beads dir in prime_session hook detection

Polecats dont have their own .beads directory - the rigs beads dir is
the authoritative source. prime_session.go was using ctx.WorkDir (polecat
worktree) for beads queries, finding nothing. Now resolves to the rigs
.beads directory when available.

Cherry-picked from PR #2506 (GH#2503).

Co-authored-by: Chris Deal <DreadPirateRobertz@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
